summary: Parallel review: FAIL (9 critical, 7 warning, 8 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: The build-verify flow correctly gains a dedicated `simplicity-review` phase (`flows.mjs`), with `evaluateSimplicityOutput` extracted as a clean helper. The run loop block at `run.mjs:1270-1296` guards on `!reviewFailed`, distinguishes empty output via an explicit `SKIP` verdict (addressing a prior round-1 concern), and sets `reviewFailed = true` on 🔴. All 590 tests pass.

🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1295 — Simplicity phase writes no handshake.json/eval.md, breaking parity with the main review at run.mjs:1252-1262; mirror `createHandshake` + `writeFileSync` so simplicity FAIL context survives crash/retry and is visible to the dashboard.

🟡 test/flows.test.mjs:326 — Direct wiring (`reviewFailed=true` + `incrementReviewRounds`) is untested; helper-level tests are green even if those lines are deleted. Add a stubbed-agent test that asserts `task.reviewRounds` is incremented on a 🔴 simplicity output.
- `run.mjs:1271-1296` — Guarded on `!reviewFailed`; 🔴 sets `reviewFailed=true`, records `lastFailure`, persists review rounds. ✓
- Direct tests at `test/flows.test.mjs:318-389` cover phase wiring, 🔴→FAIL, 🟡 non-blocking, SKIP/PASS/FAIL trichotomy, and the `!reviewFailed` guard.

The build-verify `simplicity-review` phase is implemented end-to-end (`flows.mjs:34`, `run.mjs:1270–1296`, `evaluateSimplicityOutput` helper at `flows.mjs:210`) and tests at `test/flows.test.mjs:319–390` cover the 🔴→FAIL / 🟡→PASS+backlog / SKIP-on-empty / `!reviewFailed` guard contract. Gate is green (590/590).
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1296 — Simplicity pass writes no handshake.json/eval.md; mirror createHandshake pattern from run.mjs:1252–1262 so the simplicity verdict is preserved across crash/retry.

🟡 test/flows.test.mjs:326 — `reviewFailed = true` wiring at run.mjs:1282 is only transitively tested; deleting that line leaves tests green. Add a direct wiring test (spy on incrementReviewRounds or extract a small function).
Coverage is adequate for the stated task (🔴 → FAIL, 🟡 → PASS, empty/null/undefined → SKIP, phase wiring, guard both directions). Change is additive and regression risk is low.
- `run.mjs:1281` — veto triggers only on 🔴 critical; 🟡/🔵 cannot bypass

🟡 bin/lib/flows.mjs:210 — `evaluateSimplicityOutput` has a single production call site (run.mjs:1276); fold SKIP guard back inline if a second consumer doesn't appear. Borderline premature abstraction, not vetoed because the SKIP-vs-PASS distinction is real and is the testable seam.
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1284-1288 — `readState` → patch `reviewRounds` → `writeState` block now duplicated at 3 sites (1238, 1287, 1350). Extract `persistReviewRounds(featureDir, task)` next touch.
No 🔴 (no dead code, no pure-delegate wrappers, no gold-plating). Eval written to `.team/features/simplicity-reviewer-with-veto/tasks/task-2/eval-simplicity.md`.
